nasb.text: He who loves pleasure will become a poor man; He who loves wine and oil will not become rich.

esv.text: Whoever loves pleasure will be a poor man; he who loves wine and oil will not be rich.

cnv.text: 貪愛享樂的，必成為窮乏人； 好酒愛脂油的，必不會富足。

ccb.text: 贪图享受必穷困， 奢华宴乐难富足。

csbs.text: 喜爱享乐的，必致缺乏； 喜爱酒和油的，不会富有。
